summary_en: The 'Choice Overload fMRI Dataset' (OpenNeuro ds008066, v1.0.0, OpenAlex W7167693789) was published on 2026-07-08, about two weeks before this scan. It has cited_by_count = 0, and the OpenAlex citation graph confirms zero works currently cite it (filter=cites:W7167693789 returns 0 results). No publications have yet used this dataset for outcome-prediction, biomarker, segmentation, subtyping, causal, external-validation, or foundation-model analyses -- the dataset is effectively unused in the literature so far, consistent with its very recent release date rather than any lack of research interest.
